meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve Project Stall
content.seo_description: Learn how to use onboarding to overcome project stalls. A Beginner-level guide for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress clients.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is a lack of user momentum. By implementing a frictionless onboarding flow, you guide users to their 'Aha!' moment within seconds. This creates immediate perceived value, reduces churn, and turns stalled prototypes into polished, high-converting SaaS products that clients actually pay for.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: the initial spark of a new project dies in the graveyard of half-finished repositories. The code is functional, but the product lacks the connective tissue to keep a user engaged. You aren't failing because you can't code; you're failing because you aren't building a path for your user.

Great software isn't just logic—it's guidance. When you master user onboarding, you stop staring at incomplete feature lists and start shipping experiences. This guide transforms your development workflow from 'feature-focused' to 'outcome-focused,' ensuring every project you touch finds its way to production.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the single feature that provides immediate value. We will build the onboarding flow to lead users directly to this action.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a user journey map for a SaaS onboarding flow that minimizes clicks to the primary feature. Define the 'Aha!' moment and map the 3-step sequence to reach it.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Analyze my codebase and suggest a 3-step onboarding flow for the primary feature.'

steps.title: Implement Progress Indicators
steps.description: Users need to know how much effort is required. We use Antigravity to generate a lightweight progress bar component.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, reusable React progress indicator component that tracks onboarding completion percentage.

steps.title: Build Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Don't overwhelm users. Use tooltips to explain complex features only when they are relevant.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a contextual tooltip provider that triggers on first-time interaction with specific UI elements.

steps.title: Create a Welcome Modal
steps.description: A high-conversion welcome modal sets expectations and offers a quick start guide.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a responsive welcome modal that highlights the top 3 benefits of the platform and includes a CTA button.
steps.claude_code_command: claude generate-modal --style minimalist --content 'Welcome to your new dashboard'

steps.title: Automate Onboarding State
steps.description: Ensure the onboarding state persists across sessions so returning users aren't bothered.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a custom React hook using localStorage to track onboarding completion status for individual users.

pro_tips: Never force a sign-up before the user experiences the core value; show them the magic, then ask for the email.
Use 'micro-investments'—ask for one tiny action (like naming a project) to increase user psychological commitment.
Keep your onboarding copy under 10 words per slide; users skim, they don't read.
Measure 'Time-to-Value' (TTV) as your primary KPI; if it takes more than 60 seconds, cut features.
A/B test your CTA buttons; changing 'Get Started' to 'See My Results' can increase clicks by 20%.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, monitor your conversion rates for 48 hours, then iterate on the step with the highest drop-off rate.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your best ideas rot in a folder. Master the art of onboarding and ship projects that users love. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
